data.body: SMOKE_TEST_RESULT: Story 8163-83a4 is already closed (completed in prior session). Structural verification confirms anti-deadlock conditions are in place: (1) Rule 5 exists in behavioral-testing-standard.md, (2) TDD reviewer references the standard and has instruction-file scoring guidance, (3) implementation-plan references the shared standard. The deadlocking behavior (demanding behavioral assertions for instruction files) is prevented by these changes.
